docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-12-2025 - JUDGMENT.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF RAMOS TORMO, LUIS XAVIER AS TO DEFENDANT EMIRATES AIRLINE
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-02-2026 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $600.00 FILED BY RAMOS TORMO, LUIS XAVIER AS TO DEFENDANT EMIRATES AIRLINE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-12-2025 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-30-2025, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO PLAINTIFF RAMOS TORMO, LUIS XAVIER
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM MAYRA ROSARIO FILED BY DEFENDANT EMIRATES AIRLINE
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM MAYRA ROSARIO FILED BY DEFENDANT EMIRATES AIRLINE
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-12-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-12-2025 BY JUDGE JOHN TRUE. PLAINTIFF LUIS XAVIER RAMOS TORMO APPEARED. DEFENDANT EMIRATES AIRLINE APPEARED VIA ZOOM, REPRESENTED BY MAYRA ROSARIO, CUSTOMER AFFAIRS OFFICER. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE JOHN TRUE, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RAMOS TORMO, LUIS XAVIER IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT EMIRATES AIRLINE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SC-109 AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR MAYRA ROSARIO FILED BY DEFENDANT EMIRATES AIRLINE
